hooks.command: sh -c 'o=$(PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin" uv run --no-project --with "furl-ctx[mcp]==1.3.0" python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compress_tool_output.py"); pre=${o%%"{"*}; case $o in *"{"*) printf %s "${o#"$pre"}" ;; *) printf %s "$o" ;; esac; true'

sh -c 'case "$(printf %s "$FURL_PRETOOL_PIPE" | tr "[:upper:]" "[:lower:]" | tr -d "[:space:]")" in 0|false|off|no|disabled) ;; *) o=$(PATH="$PATH:$HOME/.local/bin:$HOME/.cargo/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin" uv run --no-project --with "furl-ctx[mcp]==1.3.0" python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/pretool_pipe.py"); pre=${o%%"{"*}; case $o in *"{"*) printf %s "${o#"$pre"}" ;; *) printf %s "$o" ;; esac ;; esac; true'

sh -c '[ "$FURL_STATUS_LINE" = "0" ] || printf "%s" "{\"systemMessage\": \"furl 1.3.1 · engine furl-ctx 1.3.0; PreToolUse pipe active, set FURL_PRETOOL_PIPE=0 to disable; PostToolUse compression armed; store: per-project under ~/.furl; verify: furl_stats\"}"; true'
